Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels

Professional BOPP Clear Labels for Product Packaging & Branding

Product Title / Subtitle Section -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CONFIGURATOR LABELS ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW Size (H x W) Quantity Design Method Upload File / Design Online Configurator Labels -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCT OVERVIEW TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Premium Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels deliver professional transparent branding for product packaging, bottle labeling, and retail applications. Manufactured from high-quality BOPP (Biaxially Oriented Polypropylene) material, these waterproof labels resist water, oils, and food acids while maintaining crystal-clear visibility of your products underneath. See also [save the date magnets](https://www.decals.com/save-the-date-magnets).

The transparent design allows your product colors and textures to shine through while providing essential branding and product information. Perfect for gourmet food products, health and beauty items, beverages, and premium retail packaging where a clean, professional appearance matters most.

Available in multiple rectangle sizes from small 0.75" x 2.00" labels up to larger 5.00" x 3.00" options, these waterproof roll labels accommodate various packaging requirements. Each label features rounded corners for smooth application and professional appearance on bottles, jars, containers, and flat packaging surfaces.

Product Overview Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ORDER PROCESS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Order Process for Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels

Our streamlined ordering process makes it easy to get professional clear rectangle waterproof roll labels for your products. Choose between designing online with our user-friendly design tool or uploading your own print-ready artwork files.

Design Process

Use our online designer to create custom clear rectangle waterproof roll labels by uploading your logo or selecting from our clipart library. Alternatively, upload your own .eps vector file to ensure the highest print quality. All uploaded files receive professional prepress review to verify print readiness.

After adding your labels to cart and selecting shipping preferences, you'll receive an email proof for approval. This proof shows exactly how your clear rectangle waterproof roll labels will appear when printed, including colors, text placement, and overall design layout.

Payment

All clear rectangle waterproof roll label orders require full payment before production begins. We accept Visa, Mastercard, American Express, and Discover credit cards. Check payments are also accepted but must be received before your labels enter production.

Live Order Tracking

After placing your order, you'll receive a unique Live Order Tracking number via email. This system allows you to monitor your clear rectangle waterproof roll labels through every production stage, from initial processing to final delivery. Click the tracking link anytime to view real-time order status updates.

Order Process Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== PRODUCTION TIMES TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Label Production & Turnaround Times

Standard production time for clear rectangle waterproof roll labels is 8 business days from artwork approval. Production timing begins when your design files are approved and payment is processed, not from the initial order placement.

Standard 8 Business Day Production

Our standard production schedule provides ample time for professional printing, quality control, and careful packaging of your clear rectangle waterproof roll labels. Orders approved after 5:00 PM CST begin production the following business day.

Rush Production Options

Emergency and same-day rush production may be available for clear rectangle waterproof roll labels in certain circumstances. Contact our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 to discuss rush timeline availability and associated costs for your specific order requirements.

Production time is separate from shipping time. Your total delivery timeframe includes both production days plus shipping transit time based on your selected shipping method. If your order requires prepress adjustments or proof revisions, production timing restarts from the final approval confirmation.

Production Times Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== CUT OPTIONS TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Cut Options for Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels are precision-cut with rounded corners for professional application and enhanced durability. The rounded corner design prevents label lifting at edges while providing a polished, finished appearance on your products.

Rounded Corner Rectangle Labels

All clear rectangle waterproof roll labels feature rounded corners as the standard cut option. This design choice improves adhesion by eliminating sharp corners that could catch and lift over time. The rounded edges also provide a more premium, professional appearance compared to sharp-cornered alternatives.

The corner radius is optimized for each label size to maintain proportional aesthetics while maximizing adhesion performance. This cut style works particularly well for custom clear roll labels applied to curved surfaces like bottles and cylindrical containers.

Rectangle clear waterproof labels maintain their transparent properties throughout the cutting process, ensuring clean edges that won't cloud or discolor. The BOPP material cuts cleanly without delamination, providing consistent quality across your entire label roll.

Cut Options Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== ARTWORK TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Artwork Requirements for Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels

Professional artwork preparation ensures your clear rectangle waterproof roll labels print with optimal clarity and color accuracy. Vector artwork provides the best results for text elements and logos, while high-resolution raster images work well for photographic content.

Preferred File Types

Vector formats including EPS, AI, and PDF deliver the highest quality results for clear rectangle waterproof roll labels. Vector artwork scales perfectly to any label size while maintaining crisp edges and text clarity. When submitting vector files, clearly indicate cut lines for proper label sizing.

Additional File Formats

High-resolution raster files are acceptable when vector artwork isn't available. Submit raster images at 100% scale with 100 DPI minimum, or provide smaller scale versions with proportionally higher resolution (50% scale at 200 DPI, 25% scale at 300 DPI, etc.).

File Setup Guidelines

Convert all text to outlines or curves before submitting files to prevent font substitution issues. Set up artwork proportionate to your exact label size requirements. Include bleed only when necessary, and never flatten or merge layers in PSD files. Clearly mark cut lines for all custom waterproof roll labels to ensure accurate finishing.

Design Services

Professional vectorizing and design recreation services are available starting at $15 for simple logos. Complex artwork requires individual quoting. All design services require advance payment, and recreated artwork files remain on file for future orders. Vector artwork release for personal use available for additional cost.

Artwork Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== SHIPPING TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Shipping Your Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels ship nationwide with delivery timeframes of 2-4 business days to 90% of the United States after production completion. Standard orders ship via UPS Ground unless you select expedited shipping during checkout.

Shipping Methods

Multiple shipping speeds accommodate different delivery requirements for your clear rectangle waterproof roll labels. Economy shipping (5-15 days) provides cost-effective delivery, while overnight shipping ensures next-day arrival for urgent orders. Standard shipping (3-5 business days) offers the best balance of speed and value.

Shipping Time Expectations

Shipping time is calculated separately from production time. Your total delivery timeframe includes 8 business days for production plus your selected shipping transit time. Tracking numbers are provided once your clear rectangle waterproof roll labels ship from our facility.

Important Shipping Notes

Economy shipping may add 5-10 additional days depending on destination and requires complete address information including P.O. Box details when applicable. International shipping is available with customer-provided shipping labels and customs documentation through USPS or UPS carriers only.

Contact customer service at (320) 391-5250 for shipping rate quotes, international shipping assistance, or rush shipping availability before placing your order.

Shipping Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== INSTALLATION TAB ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Installation & Application Guide for Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels

Proper application ensures your clear rectangle waterproof roll labels adhere securely and maintain their professional appearance throughout their service life. Clean surface preparation and correct application technique maximize adhesion and durability.

Preparing the Surface

Clean the application surface thoroughly with isopropyl alcohol or degreasing solution to remove oils, dust, and residue. Allow surfaces to dry completely before applying clear rectangle waterproof roll labels. Smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, metal, and high-quality plastics provide optimal adhesion.

Applying Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels

Remove labels from the backing liner carefully to avoid stretching or damaging the material. Position the label accurately before making contact with the surface, as repositioning may compromise adhesion. Apply firm, even pressure from the center outward to eliminate air bubbles and ensure complete contact.

For curved surfaces like bottles, start application at one edge and work across the label gradually. This technique prevents wrinkles and ensures the BOPP material conforms properly to the surface curvature without creating stress points.

Final Application Tips

Allow 24-48 hours for full adhesive cure before exposing clear rectangle waterproof roll labels to moisture, temperature extremes, or mechanical stress. The rounded corners design helps prevent edge lifting, but proper surface preparation remains critical for long-term performance.

For additional installation guidance, visit our comprehensive installation guides section with detailed video tutorials and troubleshooting tips.

Installation Tab -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== POST-TAB CONTENT ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

What Are Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels?

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels are transparent adhesive labels made from BOPP (Biaxially Oriented Polypropylene) material that resist water, oils, and acids. These labels come pre-cut in rectangle shapes with rounded corners and are wound on convenient rolls for easy dispensing. They're commonly used for product packaging, bottle labeling, and retail applications where transparent branding is desired, and they install by removing the backing liner and applying to clean, smooth surfaces.

Design Your Custom Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Labels

Ready to enhance your product packaging with professional clear rectangle waterproof roll labels? Our high-quality BOPP material ensures durability and crystal-clear transparency that showcases your products while providing essential branding. With multiple size options, convenient roll format, and waterproof properties, these labels deliver the professional appearance your products deserve.

Choose from our extensive size range or work with our design team to create labels that perfectly match your packaging requirements. Whether you're labeling gourmet foods, beauty products, or retail merchandise, clear rectangle waterproof roll labels provide the transparent, professional look that builds customer confidence.

Upload your artwork today or use our online design tool to create custom clear rectangle waterproof roll labels that represent your brand with clarity and style. Our custom hard hat stickers and other specialized products showcase the same attention to quality and detail you'll receive with every order.

Post-Tab Content (Before FAQ) -------------------------------------------------- ================================================== FAQ ================================================== COPY EVERYTHING BELOW

Clear Rectangle Waterproof Roll Label FAQs

What cut options are available for clear rectangle waterproof roll labels?

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels come with rounded corners as the standard cut option. The rounded corner design prevents edge lifting and provides a professional appearance while improving adhesion performance on various surfaces including bottles, containers, and flat packaging.

Why choose clear rectangle waterproof roll labels for my products?

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels offer transparent branding that allows your product colors and textures to show through while providing essential product information. The BOPP material resists water, oils, and food acids, making them ideal for gourmet foods, beverages, health and beauty products, and premium retail packaging.

How long do clear rectangle waterproof roll labels last on products?

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels maintain their adhesion and clarity for 2-3 years when properly applied to clean, smooth surfaces. The BOPP material resists fading, cracking, and moisture damage, ensuring your product labeling remains professional throughout the product's shelf life.

What surfaces work best with clear rectangle waterproof roll labels?

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels adhere best to smooth, non-porous surfaces like glass, metal, high-quality plastics, and sealed containers. Clean the surface thoroughly before application for optimal adhesion. The labels conform well to slightly curved surfaces like bottles and cylindrical containers.

Can clear rectangle waterproof roll labels be removed without damaging products?

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels can be removed from most surfaces, though some adhesive residue may remain depending on surface type and application duration. The BOPP material typically removes cleanly from glass and metal surfaces when warmed slightly during removal.

What artwork format works best for clear rectangle waterproof roll labels?

Vector artwork in EPS, AI, or PDF formats produces the highest quality results for clear rectangle waterproof roll labels. Vector files maintain crisp edges and text clarity at any size. Convert all fonts to outlines and clearly indicate cut lines for proper label sizing and finishing.

Are clear rectangle waterproof roll labels food-safe for direct food contact?

Clear rectangle waterproof roll labels are suitable for indirect food contact applications like bottle labels and package exteriors. For direct food contact applications, consult with our customer service team at (320) 391-5250 to discuss specific food safety requirements and material certifications.
